response.text: ACTIONS_JSON: {"summary":"Built 4 verified planner steps without a model call.","findings":[],"suggestedFixes":["Filled connect/disconnect instrumentIds with workspace alias \"afg1\" for direct chat apply compatibility."],"actions":[{"type":"replace_flow","flow":{"name":"AFG Planner Flow","description":"Set sine wave 1kHz 2Vpp 50ohm output on","backend":"pyvisa","deviceType":"AFG","steps":[{"id":"1","type":"connect","label":"Connect","params":{"instrumentIds":["afg1"],"printIdn":true}},{"id":"2","type":"write","label":"Write SOURce1:FREQuency:FIXed","params":{"command":"SOURce1:FREQuency:FIXed 1000"}},{"id":"3","type":"write","label":"Write SOURce1:VOLTage:LEVel:IMMediate:AMPLitude","params":{"command":"SOURce1:VOLTage:LEVel:IMMediate:AMPLitude 2"}},{"id":"4","type":"write","label":"Write OUTPut1:IMPedance","params":{"command":"OUTPut1:IMPedance 50"}},{"id":"5","type":"write","label":"Write OUTPut1:STATe","params":{"command":"OUTPut1:STATe ON"}},{"id":"6","type":"disconnect","label":"Disconnect","params":{"instrumentIds":["afg1"]}}]}}]}
